scope: Preserve scenario provenance and expose machine-readable release-gate reasons/evidence refs.
changes: ReleaseGateResult now includes per-scenario result details.
ReleaseGateResult now includes evidence_refs for readiness check, scenario run, certificate, and failing/errored scenarios.
Harborline vertical test asserts source VR, incident, label, scenario evidence refs, gate reason, and pass/fail evidence.

checks.command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/test_auth.py tests/test_certificates.py tests/test_ingestion.py tests/test_live_status.py tests/test_release_gate_vertical.py tests/test_replay.py tests/test_verification.py tests/test_viz.py

acceptance_criteria: Promoted scenarios preserve source Verification Record, source incident, approved label, and evidence refs.
Release Gate fail/pass output includes stable scenario_run_id and per-scenario reasons.
Release Gate output includes machine-readable evidence refs.
Passing Release Gate output references the Proof of Readiness certificate.
